criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level of AI integration for personalized recommendations, visual search, and chatbots.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and navigability of the app.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech reviews, app store descriptions

criteria.name: Product Variety
criteria.description: Range and diversity of products available on the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, official websites

criteria.name: Customer Support
criteria.description: Quality and responsiveness of customer support services.
criteria.sources: User reviews, customer support ratings, official websites

criteria.name: Security Features
criteria.description: Strength of security measures to protect user data.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: Payment Options
criteria.description: Variety and convenience of payment methods offered.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, official websites

criteria.name: Shipping Options
criteria.description: Variety and convenience of shipping methods offered.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, official websites

criteria.name: Return Policy
criteria.description: Ease and flexibility of the return process.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, official websites
